stemHtml: When about to operate an aircraft with an inoperative item of equipment, which document should the Commander use as a reference?

options.a: Minimum Equipment List produced by the operator and based on the Aeroplane Flight Manual.
options.b: Master Minimum Equipment List produced by the manufacturer and approved by the Competent Authority.
options.c: Minimum Equipment List produced by the operator and approved by the Competent Authority.
options.d: Master Minimum Equipment List produced by the operator and approved by the Competent Authority.
